name: John Hicks
abstract: John Josephus Hicks Jr. (December 21, 1941 – May 10, 2006) was an American jazz pianist, composer, and arranger.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Newport Jazz Festival: Betty Carter and Her Trio/ Thad Jones-Mel Lewis Orchestra with Dizzy Gillespie, Elvin Jones, and Hank Jones
Kool-Newport Jazz Festival: John Hicks: Solo Piano

works.t: Piece in Memory of John Chapman

works_created.t: Piece in Memory of John Chapman

about_quotes.speaker: Sam Jones
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I remember an incident, man, there was a John Hicks--no, not John Hicks, John--what that boy's name--piano player--excellent piano player from Philadelphia, man.

about_quotes.speaker: Big Nick Nicholas
about_quotes.evidence: And, of course, the trio that I had there: Walter Booker on bass and Jimmy Cobbs (sic) on drums and John Hicks on piano, they had the right attitude.

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: The Kenny Barron and John Hicks broadcast: that was a record, actually... It must have been a duet with you and John Hicks. Oh, yeah.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: We used to sit down and party and make records all night, with John Hicks, everybody.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Cobb — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] It all has to do with how you achieve visibility. One of the hippest things I ever heard was from the late John Hicks, who said, “If you’re not appearing, you’re disappearing.” [INTERVIEWEE] Yes, in one way or the other.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Davis
about_quotes.evidence: And it was John Hicks... he kind of looked over at me like oh man this guy... But then later I think he heard me with Jackie McLean and the next time I went in he kind of recognized me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Davis interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, December 15, 2017
